songs.title: Mad Season
feed: “Mad Season” by Matchbox Twenty reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Mad Season” by Matchbox Twenty reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 1 spot to #1.
“Mad Season” by Matchbox Twenty is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 138 sales units.
“Mad Season” by Matchbox Twenty is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 230 streams units.
“Mad Season” by Matchbox Twenty is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 442,981 total units.
